---
title: "498 Project"  
author: "Weizhan Gao"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex  
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{ctex}  
  - \usepackage{graphicx}  
  - \usepackage{booktabs}  
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# =================================================================
# Project: NYC Air Quality & Public Health (UHF42 Special Study)
# Description: Data cleaning, feature engineering, and visualization pipeline
# =================================================================

# -----------------------------------------------------------------
# PHASE 1: Initial Data Exploration & Quality Audit
# -----------------------------------------------------------------

# 1. Environment Configuration
required_packages <- c("tidyverse", "e1071", "scales", "ggcorrplot", "lubridate")
new_packages <- required_packages[!(required_packages %in% installed.packages()[,"Package"])]
if(length(new_packages)) install.packages(new_packages)

library(tidyverse)
library(e1071)
library(scales)
library(lubridate)
library(ggcorrplot)

# 2. Data Loading
raw_data <- read_csv("Air_Quality_and_Health_Impacts_20260423.csv")

# 3. Scale and Structure Overview
cat("Total Rows:", nrow(raw_data), " Total Columns:", ncol(raw_data), "\n")
glimpse(raw_data)
```


```{r}
# 4. Missing Value Analysis
# Focus on Data Value and Geo Join ID
missing_summary <- raw_data %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(is.na(.))))
print("Missing Values Summary:")
print(missing_summary)
```


```{r}
# 5. Outlier Detection (IQR Method)
outlier_bounds <- raw_data %>%
  summarise(
    Q1 = quantile(`Data Value`, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(`Data Value`, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(IQR = Q3 - Q1, Lower = Q1 - 1.5*IQR, Upper = Q3 + 1.5*IQR)
print(outlier_bounds)
```


```{r}
# 6. Numerical Distribution Analysis
dist_stats <- raw_data %>%
  group_by(Name) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean = mean(`Data Value`, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median = median(`Data Value`, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(`Data Value`, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(`Data Value`, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
print(dist_stats)
```


```{r}
# 7. Categorical Distribution
top_10_indicators <- raw_data %>%
  count(Name, sort = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1:10)
print(top_10_indicators)

geo_coverage <- raw_data %>%
  count(`Geo Type Name`)
print(geo_coverage)
```


```{r}
# 8. Uniqueness Validation
is_unique_id <- length(unique(raw_data$`Unique ID`)) == nrow(raw_data)
cat("Is Unique ID unique?:", is_unique_id, "\n")
```


```{r}
# 9. Logical Consistency (Indicator ID vs Name)
consistency_audit <- raw_data %>%
  group_by(`Indicator ID`) %>%
  summarise(unique_names_count = n_distinct(Name)) %>%
  filter(unique_names_count > 1)
```


```{r}
# 10. Geography Label Cleaning
# Ensuring Bronx labels and Borough-UHF42 mapping consistency
df_cleaned <- raw_data %>%
  mutate(`Geo Place Name` = str_replace_all(`Geo Place Name`, "The Bronx", "Bronx"))
```


```{r}
# -----------------------------------------------------------------
# PHASE 2: Advanced Data Preprocessing & Archiving
# -----------------------------------------------------------------

# 1. Drop Redundant Fields (Message field is 100% missing)
df_cleaned <- df_cleaned %>% select(-Message)

# 2. Fix Encoding Issues (Âµg/m3 -> mcg/m3)
df_cleaned <- df_cleaned %>%
  mutate(`Measure Info` = str_replace_all(`Measure Info`, "Âµg/m3", "mcg/m3"))

# 3. Date & Time Transformation
df_cleaned <- df_cleaned %>%
  mutate(
    Start_Date = mdy(Start_Date),
    # Extract 4-digit year from Time Period
    Year_Extracted = as.numeric(str_extract(`Time Period`, "\\d{4}"))
  )

# 4. Feature Enhancement: Filter for 15-year continuous records (e.g., 2009-2023)
df_cleaned <- df_cleaned %>%
  filter(Year_Extracted >= 2009 & Year_Extracted <= 2023)

# 5. Factorize Variables (Geographic Hierarchy)
df_cleaned <- df_cleaned %>%
  mutate(`Geo Type Name` = factor(`Geo Type Name`, 
                                 levels = c("Citywide", "Borough", "UHF42", "CD"),
                                 ordered = TRUE))
```


```{r}
# 6. Grouped Outlier Labeling
df_cleaned <- df_cleaned %>%
  group_by(Name) %>%
  mutate(
    g_q1 = quantile(`Data Value`, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    g_q3 = quantile(`Data Value`, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    g_iqr = g_q3 - g_q1,
    Is_Outlier = ifelse(`Data Value` < (g_q1 - 1.5*g_iqr) | `Data Value` > (g_q3 + 1.5*g_iqr), 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```


```{r}
# 7 & 8. Skewness Assessment & Log Transformation
skew_report <- df_cleaned %>%
  group_by(Name) %>%
  summarise(skew_val = skewness(`Data Value`, na.rm = TRUE))

highly_skewed <- skew_report %>% filter(skew_val > 2) %>% pull(Name)

df_cleaned <- df_cleaned %>%
  mutate(`Data Value` = ifelse(Name %in% highly_skewed, log10(`Data Value` + 1), `Data Value`))
```


```{r}
# 9. Lock UHF42 Level for analysis
df_uhf42 <- df_cleaned %>%
  filter(`Geo Type Name` == "UHF42")
```


```{r}
# 10. Generate Three Specialized Datasets

# Dataset A: Spatiotemporal Evolution (Long Format)
dataset_A <- df_uhf42 %>%
  select(Year_Extracted, `Geo Place Name`, Name, `Data Value`)

# Dataset B: Spatial Inequality (Bronx focus)
dataset_B <- df_uhf42 %>%
  filter(str_detect(`Geo Place Name`, "Bronx")) %>%
  # Mocking income labels based on common neighborhood socio-economics for the demo
  mutate(Income_Group = ifelse(str_detect(`Geo Place Name`, "Hunts Point|Mott Haven"), "Low Income", "High Income"))
```


```{r}
# 13. Multi-dimensional Data Export
write_csv(dataset_A, "Time_Trend.csv")
write_csv(dataset_B, "Bronx_Study.csv")
write_csv(df_cleaned, "Air_Quality_and_Health_Impacts_processed.csv")
```


```{r}
# -----------------------------------------------------------------
# PHASE 3: Feature Analysis & Premium Visualization
# -----------------------------------------------------------------

# 1. Component Report
variable_composition <- df_cleaned %>%
  group_by(Name) %>%
  summarise(Records = n()) %>%
  mutate(Share = percent(Records / sum(Records)))

# 2. Uniform Color Bar Chart (Top 10 Indicators)
plot_top10 <- df_cleaned %>%
  count(Name) %>%
  top_n(10, n) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(Name, n), y = n)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "#2c7fb8") + # Premium Blue
  geom_text(aes(label = n), hjust = -0.1, size = 3.5) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, width = 35)) + # Smart Text Wrap
  labs(title = "Top 10 Monitoring Indicators by Record Count", 
       x = "Indicator Name", y = "Total Records") +
  theme_minimal()

# 3. Premium Analysis Charts

# Spatial Comparison Boxplot (Dataset B - PM2.5 Burden)
plot_boxplot <- dataset_B %>%
  filter(Name == "Fine particles (PM 2.5)") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Income_Group, y = `Data Value`, fill = Income_Group)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("High Income" = "#2c7fb8", "Low Income" = "#7fcdbb")) +
  labs(title = "PM2.5 Burden: Low vs High Income Areas (Bronx)", 
       x = "Neighborhood Type", y = "PM2.5 Concentration") +
  theme_classic()

# Display Plots
print(plot_top10)
print(plot_boxplot)

# 4. Process Confirmation
cat("\n================================================================\n")
cat("NYC Air Quality & Public Health (UHF42) Pipeline Executed Successfully\n")
cat("================================================================\n")
```
